mods.name: Chance-LongerCables
mods.author: Chance_4090
mods.description: Multiply the length of the cable/pipe tools (Water, Power, Crude Oil, Refined oil, Biofuel and Beacon Sticks) to be 10 times longer.

mods.name: Chance-LitSigns

mods.description: Make all sign text glow in the dark and adds many more colors to choose from!
